settings.title: PRODUCT DETAILS
settings.content:
Fabric: 100% Banarasi Silk

Work: Hand Mirror Embroidery (Shisha Work)

Blouse Type: Readymade / Pre-Stitched

Closure: Hook & Eye (5 Hooks)

Care: Dry Clean Only

Origin: Handcrafted in India

settings.title: MEASUREMENTS & SIZING
settings.content: All measurements are in inches. If between sizes, choose the larger size. Sizes 32–39 available.

settings.title: CARE INSTRUCTIONS
settings.content: No machine wash. Dry clean only. Do not tumble dry. Handle gently. Store in a dark place using a cloth bag.

settings.title: SHIPPING & RETURNS
settings.content:
Ships in 2–3 business days via tracked courier. Free shipping on orders above ₹999.

Free returns within 7 days of delivery for standard sizes.

settings.review_text: The quality of this blouse is beyond my expectations. The mirror work is so delicate and the silk feels incredibly luxurious.
Ordered a custom size and it fit like a dream. Highly recommended!
The embroidery work is absolutely exquisite. The fabric quality is top-notch.
